source_excerpt: "I am never hungry," he said, "and it is a lucky thing I am not, for my mouth is only painted, and if I should cut a hole in it so I could eat, the straw I am stuffed with would come out, and that would spoil the shape of my head."

dialogue_text: Tell me something about yourself and the country you came from,
source_excerpt: "Tell me something about yourself and the country you came from," said the Scarecrow, when she had finished her dinner. So she told him all about Kansas, and how gray everything was there, and how the cyclone had carried her to this quee...

dialogue_text: I cannot understand why you should wish to leave this beautiful country and go back to the dry, gray place you call Kansas.
source_excerpt: The Scarecrow listened carefully, and said, "I cannot understand why you should wish to leave this beautiful country and go back to the dry, gray place you call Kansas."
